compactPrompt: When compacting this session, you MUST preserve verbatim: all active tasks and their checkbox state from dreams.md §1 (the Astro migration phases), any open incidents in dreams.md §2, the load-bearing rules from CLAUDE.md (static-first/no-Vercel, the CF Pages build-settings deploy trap, native view transitions / no ClientRouter, the glow pre-paint script rule), the exact file paths modified on this branch, and any precise error signatures currently under evaluation. Discard greeting filler, historical conversational prose, and superseded styling discussion.

hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""' | grep -qE '(pnpm( +run)? +(build|preview)|astro +(build|check))' && printf '%s' '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"CRITICAL: if structure/routes/architecture shifted, update CLAUDE.md, README.md, and dreams.md in the same change."}}' || true
